title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.160 - Alzheimer's Awareness Day proclaimed, second Tuesday in March
text:
9.160.  Alzheimer's Awareness Day proclaimed, second Tuesday in March. — The governor shall annually issue a proclamation setting apart the second Tuesday of March as "Alzheimer's Awareness Day", and recommending to the people of the state that the day be appropriately observed through activities which will increase awareness of Alzheimer's disease and related dementias.
(L. 2001 H.B. 603)
